results.generic_name: Sensor, Glucose, Invasive, Component of automated insulin delivery system
results.ao_statement: to add the Medtronic Northridge facility as an additional site for conducting post-sterilization quality testing for the Simplera Sync sensor. The Simplera Sync sensor is a component of the MiniMed 780G System

openfda.device_name: Sensor, Glucose, Invasive, Component Of Automated Insulin Delivery System

results.generic_name: Sensor, Glucose, Invasive, Component of automated insulin delivery system
results.supplement_type: Normal 180 Day Track No User Fee
results.ao_statement: Approval for a manufacturing site located at Minimed Kentucky Distribution Center (aka UPS Supply Chain Solutions), 1860 Outer Loop #326, Louisville, KY 40219, USA, FEI 3006759904, for repacking and labeling.

openfda.device_name: Sensor, Glucose, Invasive, Component Of Automated Insulin Delivery System

results.generic_name: Sensor, Glucose, Invasive, Component of automated insulin delivery system
results.ao_statement: addition of a new supplier for a critical component of the Guardian Sensor (3) and Guardian 4 Sensor. The Guardian Sensor (3) is a component of the MiniMed 670G, MiniMed 770G, and MiniMed 780G Systems, MiniMed 630G System with Smart Guard, and Guardian Connect Systems. The Guardian 4 Sensor is a component of the MiniMed 780G System

results.ao_statement: addition of an alternate manufacturing site for the final assembly of the Guardian 4 Sensor. The Guardian 4 sensor is a component of the MiniMed 780G System

openfda.device_name: Sensor, Glucose, Invasive, Component Of Automated Insulin Delivery System

results.generic_name: Sensor, Glucose, Invasive, Component of automated insulin delivery system
results.ao_statement: addition of an alternate manufacturing site for the sensor fabrication processes for the Simplera and Simplera Sync sensors. The Simplera Sensor is a component of the Simplera system. The Simplera Sync sensor is a component of the MiniMed 780G system

openfda.device_name: Sensor, Glucose, Invasive, Component Of Automated Insulin Delivery System

results.generic_name: Sensor, Glucose, Invasive, Component of automated insulin delivery system
results.ao_statement: Approval of the Simplera Sync sensor and Guardian 4 sensor, intended to function as components of a Medtronic automated insulin dosing system.

openfda.device_name: Sensor, Glucose, Invasive, Component Of Automated Insulin Delivery System

results.generic_name: Sensor, Glucose, Invasive, Component of automated insulin delivery system
results.ao_statement: to increase the capacity for the degassing of Simplera and Simplera Sync sensors by adding an additional degassing aeration room (Degassing Room #3) at a sterilization facility. The Simplera sensor is a component of the Simplera system. The Simplera Sync sensor is a component of the MiniMed 780G system. The Simplera Sync sensor is also approved for use with compatible cleared MiniMed devices

openfda.device_name: Sensor, Glucose, Invasive, Component Of Automated Insulin Delivery System

results.generic_name: Sensor, Glucose, Invasive, Component of automated insulin delivery system
results.ao_statement: to update the inspection requirements performed by Medtronic Tempe Campus (MTC) on a component used in the glucose sensor Printed Circuit Board Assembly (PCBA).  The PCBA is a component of the Minimed 670G system, Guardian connect system, and Simplera sync sensor, guardian 4 sensor
